description: Call GET /api/v1/google/maps/posts for Google SERP Maps Posts through Just Serp API with data_id.

operations.description: Get Google maps Posts data, including business post content, post dates and images, and profile-specific feeds, for local business monitoring and promotion tracking.

parameters.description: The unique Google Maps location ID (feature ID). You can get this from our Google Maps Search API.
parameters.name: data_id

parameters.description: Token used to retrieve the next page of business posts.
parameters.name: next_page_token

responses.description: Authentication failed: API Key is invalid or missing
Access denied: Insufficient credits or quota exceeded
Internal server error or upstream service exception
